goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'bishops stortford' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'phone number', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from bishops stortford and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 11:30
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get postcode, phone number, and address
